name: Chernobyl Trap
short_description: You are survived pilot of fallen helicopter. Your mission is simple: go to evacuation point. But can you do it and not die?
detailed_description:
Survival isn't a choice. It's a sentence. Fight, survive, and reach the evacuation point in a dynamic first-person shooter where every second could be your last.

Explore the dark yet hypnotic Exclusion Zone, where after a helicopter crash, you're the only hope for salvation. Chernobyl Trap combines furious arcade action with a dense post-apocalyptic atmosphere: fast-paced shootouts, ruthless enemies, and limited resources force you to make tough decisions on the fly.

Each level is a challenge: fractures, traps, darkness, and radiation are unforgiving. Wooden crates conceal supplies, weather conditions change combat tactics, and the changing time of day transforms familiar locations into deadly traps. But you have everything you need to fight your way through: from pistols to melee weapons and an intuition that separates the survivors from those who won't make it to evacuation.

Key Features

Intense arcade-style combat gameplay: fast-paced battles, spectacular brawls, and an instant adrenaline rush.

A variety of weapons: firearms, melee weapons, and improvised defenses.

Dynamic weather and day-and-night cycles affect enemy visibility and behavior.

Destructible environments: smash crates, scavenge for supplies, and use the environment to your advantage.

Autosave when moving to the next area is convenient and fair.

Fully customizable controls: remap keys to suit your needs.

Why you should play

For those who enjoy adrenaline and quick decisions.

For fans of a tense atmosphere and visual immersion.

For players who value short but intense gaming sessions.

Call to Action

Clear, loud, with no room for error—Chernobyl Trap awaits your challenge. Gear up, break through, and escape... if you can.
